Hi, I'm
Zimal Tajwer

Full-Stack Web & App Specialist & Software Engineer

A passionate 7th-grade student building the future of web and mobile applications. Currently working as a 3D Web Developer (Remote, project-based) at Bitvista, specializing in immersive experiences, backend systems, and mobile apps.

Developer at Bitvista

Grade Student Prodigy

Top 3

Aptech Hackathon

Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning

Exploring the Future of AI & Data Analytics

As a software engineer, I believe that combining immersive frontend graphics with intelligent backends is the next frontier of web design. Concurrently with my 7th-grade coursework, I am deep-diving into Data Analysis, Machine Learning, and Python.

I develop platforms like Neuro-Magic (a Prompt Engineering system) and Torch (an automated product matching application) to harness AI capabilities. My goal is to build intelligent web apps that can solve complex logic and automate decisions on the fly.

Python Programming
Data Analysis
Prompt Engineering

What I Excel At

3D Web Development

Creating highly custom WebGL systems, Three.js shaders, and interactive glTF/glb scenes that respond to camera overlays, scroll timelines, and cursor movements.

Full-Stack Systems

Designing modern, secure databases (MySQL, MariaDB, SQLite) and writing scalable API services with PHP, Laravel, and Flask backends.

Cross-Platform Mobile Apps

Developing native, performant applications for Android and iOS devices using Flutter and Dart, integrating local databases (Sqflite) and state management.

Education & Coding Tutorials

Taj World Tech YouTube Channel

I love sharing my knowledge with the developer community. On my channel @tajworld-tech, I publish tutorials on game development, python scripts, full-stack web architectures, and mobile app design.

Subscribe on YouTube
Python Pygame: Naruto vs Sasuke Fighting Game Tutorial

Naruto vs Sasuke Pygame Tutorial

Learn how to code a complete retro arcade fighter in Python Pygame.

About Me

Full-Stack & 3D Specialist

I am a self-taught, driven software engineer and full-stack developer who is concurrently navigating middle school (7th grade). My programming journey spans modern frameworks, interactive 3D graphics, native applications, and complex database engines.

My primary focus lies in creating robust architectures combined with elegant, visually stunning user interfaces. Currently, I am expanding my skills as a Data Analyst and learning advanced Python.

Education

7th Grade Student

Remote Only

Learning

Tools of the Trade

Crafting Interactive Systems

Clean code, tactile interfaces, and efficient algorithms are the foundation of high-performance apps. By bridging custom interactive frontends with structured backend architectures, I create systems that run smoothly and look beautiful.

Career Journey

Present

3D Web Developer (Remote)

Bitvista (Project-Based)

Leading the development of highly interactive 3D web applications, integrating WebGL and custom 3D model interactions to deliver premium immersive digital products.

Internship

Full-Stack Intern

decodeLabs

Acquired extensive hands-on experience building, testing, and shipping production-level applications. Collaborated remotely, working on database integrations and frontend layouts.
